attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.REFRESH_DATETIME, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.XAAS_LINE_ID, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.ITEM_NAME, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRICE_LIST_ID, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.VERSION_NO, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.LIST_PRICE, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.EXTENSION_ID, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.REQUEST_ID, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.CREATED_DATE, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.CREATED_BY, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.MIN_QTY, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.MAX_QTY, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.INITIAL_TERM_FROM, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.INITIAL_TERM_TO, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRE_PAY_FROM, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRE_PAY_TO, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.RATE_TABLE, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.RATE_TABLE_NAME, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.ERROR_MESSAGE_NAME, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.DOLLAR_ADJUSTABLE_FLAG, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRICING_FORMULA, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.DECIMAL_EXPANSION_VALUE, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.ACTIVE_FLAG, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PROCESS_DATE, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRICING_ID, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.BASE_PRICE, CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRICING_TERM , 
CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PLAN_TYPE  
FROM
 CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES 
WHERE
 SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES)
and XAAS_LINE_ID not in ( '6001')
attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.XAAS_LINE_ID, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.ITEM_NAME, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRICE_LIST_ID, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.VERSION_NO, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.EXTENSION_ID, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.REQUEST_ID, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.CREATED_DATE, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.CREATED_BY, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.INITIAL_TERM_FROM, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.INITIAL_TERM_TO, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRE_PAY_FROM, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRE_PAY_TO, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.RATE_TABLE, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.RATE_TABLE_NAME, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.ERROR_MESSAGE_NAME, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.DOLLAR_ADJUSTABLE_FLAG, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRICING_FORMULA, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.DECIMAL_EXPANSION_VALUE, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.ACTIVE_FLAG, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PROCESS_DATE, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRICING_ID, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.MIN_QTY, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.MAX_QTY, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.LIST_PRICE, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.BASE_PRICE,
STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRICING_TERM,  /* SIGORANT ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY19 */ 
STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PLAN_TYPE 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES,
 (
 select ITEM_NAME ,PRICE_LIST_ID ,VERSION_NO ,REFRESH_DATETIME , PLAN_TYPE  from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES
 minus
 select ITEM_NAME ,PRICE_LIST_ID ,VERSION_NO ,REFRESH_DATETIME , PLAN_TYPE  from $$NRTACCUMDB.XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ITEM_NAME = STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.ITEM_NAME and ACM.PRICE_LIST_ID=STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PRICE_LIST_ID
 and ACM.VERSION_NO=STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.VERSION_NO and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.REFRESH_DATETIME and ACM.PLAN_TYPE=STG_XXCPD_XAAS_LIST_PRICES.PLAN_TYPE
